events.label: reasoning
events.text:
我们被要求评估法兰接头的合规性。场景是重工业现场，工作处于“rough-complete”阶段，观察到的情况是“incomplete bolt pattern”。参考标准有ASME PCC-1和B16.5。任务：决定是否符合规范，输出JSON。

分析：法兰接头的螺栓孔模式不完整，即没有按标准安装全部螺栓。在rough-complete阶段，可能还未完成最终安装，但法兰接头的螺栓缺失是严重缺陷，可能导致泄漏或失效。根据ASME PCC-1（压力边界法兰接头装配指南）和B16.5（管法兰和法兰管件），法兰连接必须使用完整数量的螺栓并按正确顺序紧固。不完整的螺栓模式属于不合格（non-compliant），应判定为fail。风险级别高，因为可能导致泄漏或事故。组件条件：installed-defective, non-compliant。工作阶段：rough-complete。进展百分比：大致估计，法兰安装可能已完成大部分，但缺少螺栓，可能为80%左右？但更准确地说，螺栓缺失代表关键步骤未完成，所以进展可能较低。但题目说roughed in，可能已经安装但未最终完成，我们可以设一个合理值如70%。value没有数值，可以设为0。findings和actions需要描述。rationale简述。references引用ASME PCC-1和B16.5。

JSON需要包括所有字段。注意输出格式必须是纯JSON，没有markdown包装。

生成答案。

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 70,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Incomplete bolt pattern on flanged joint — not all bolts installed.",
    "Missing bolts compromise joint integrity and leak tightness."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work on this joint immediately and quarantine.",
    "Install all required bolts per flange specification and tighten to specified torque/pattern per ASME PCC-1.",
    "Re-inspect before returning to service."
  ],
  "rationale": "Flanged joints must have a full complement of bolts properly installed to meet pressure boundary requirements. An incomplete bolt pattern is a non-compliance with ASME PCC-1 and ASME B16.5, posing a high risk of leakage or catastrophic failure.",
  "references": ["ASME PCC-1", "ASME B16.5"]
}
